title: MrBeast Dimension
description: A dimension mod that adds new items, mobs, food, and MrBeast himself!
body:
This mod adds a brand new dimension (and a secret Chandler one) that is full of new features. The new dimensions add two new woodsets, 3 new armor sets, food types (feastables, prime, lunchly, etc), and a new mobs such as: Jimmy, Logan, JJ, Chandler, and a new boss! This mod will be great for anyone who is a fan of MrBeast and wants a new experience during their modded adventures.

credits for original Beast Bux image: [https://www.reddit.com/r/MrBeast/comments/na6kn5/new_dollar_bill_will_exist_if_mrbeast_was/](https://www.reddit.com/r/MrBeast/comments/na6kn5/new_dollar_bill_will_exist_if_mrbeast_was/)

_this mod is not affiliated with MrBeast, Feastables, Prime, Lunchly, or MrBeast Burger_

_this mod is a parody_

_created in MCreator_
